stories.headline: Jeff Bezos's Prometheus raises $12B to build an AI that designs buildings and drugs
stories.blurb: The physical AI startup just closed a $12 billion round at a $41 billion valuation. Prometheus is building what it calls an 'artificial general engineer' — AI that can automate heavy engineering tasks like infrastructure design and drug development, not just write code or chat.
stories.why_it_matters: Physical-world engineering is one of the last major professional domains AI hasn't cracked at scale.
stories.original_headline: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‘artificial general engineer’ for the physical world

stories.headline: DoorDash's new chatbot lets you order food by describing what you want
stories.blurb: Ask DoorDash replaces the usual scroll-and-tap with a chat interface where you type 'something spicy under $20' or snap a photo of a dish you want. The AI searches restaurants, builds your cart, and handles checkout — no menu browsing required.
stories.why_it_matters: Search-by-description could become the default UI for any app with too many options to browse.
stories.original_headline: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos

stories.headline: Google's new text model writes whole blocks at once instead of one word at a time
stories.blurb: DeepMind released DiffusionGemma, an experimental model that generates multiple words in parallel rather than sequentially. NVIDIA optimized it to run locally on RTX GPUs, targeting single-user workloads where low latency matters more than multi-user throughput.
stories.why_it_matters: Parallel generation could make local AI feel more responsive for individual developers and creators.
stories.original_headline: NVIDIA Accelerates Google DeepMind’s DiffusionGemma for Local AI

stories.headline: Coinbase just launched a tool that lets AI agents trade crypto for you
stories.blurb: Coinbase released a new API that gives AI agents the ability to execute trades and manage payments on behalf of users. The company is betting that autonomous agents will become the main way people handle financial transactions, starting with crypto trading and payments.
stories.why_it_matters: AI agents are moving from chatbots to things that can actually spend and move your money.
stories.original_headline: Coinbase launches tool to let AI agents manage trading and payments

stories.headline: LG and NVIDIA are building an AI factory for robots and self-driving cars
stories.blurb: LG Group is partnering with NVIDIA to build what they're calling an 'AI factory' — accelerated computing infrastructure to train and deploy AI for robotics, autonomous vehicles, and GPU cloud services. The setup will let LG simulate, validate, and run AI applications across its hardware businesses.
stories.why_it_matters: Major manufacturers are now building dedicated AI infrastructure to ship physical products, not just software.
stories.original_headline: NVIDIA and LG Group Build an AI Factory to Advance Physical AI, Mobility and AI Infrastructure

try_this_prompt.title: The priority audit
try_this_prompt.prompt: I'll list everything I think I need to do this week. For each item, tell me: is this urgent-important, just urgent, just important, or neither? Then show me what my week looks like if I only do the important things and let the rest resolve itself or fail visibly.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: When your to-do list is longer than your actual available hours.

daily_question: What's one thing you wish AI could design for you that doesn't exist yet?
